name: morphius
description: A blank-canvas webtop host. All visible applications come from modules.
author: Levente Daniel Feher

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/backend" "npm run dev -w packages/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run build -w packages/frontend
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/core/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/backend/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/frontend/tsconfig.json
